headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Intuitive Surgical, Lowers Price Target to $520
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Mathew Blackman   maintains Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ:ISRG) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $585 to $520.

headline: Intuitive Surgical Has +35% Upside: A Compelling Buy Story Before July 16
summary: Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ:ISRG) looks compelling ahead of its July 16 earnings report, and the setup rarely gets this clean for a category leader trading well below fair value. Shares sit at $413.58, down 26.71% YTD, while the 247 base-case target of $559.79 implies 35.35% upside. Wall Street sits higher still at $563.35, with 22 buy ... headline: Intuitive Surgical Likely To Report Higher Q2 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
